2603.25379.title: Does Structured Intent Representation Generalize? A Cross-Language, Cross-Model Empirical Study of 5W3H Prompting
2603.25379.paper_summary: Does structured intent representation generalize across languages and models? We study PPS (Prompt Protocol Specification), a 5W3H-based framework for structured intent representation in human-AI interaction, and extend prior Chinese-only evidence along three dimensions: two additional languages (English and Japanese), a fourth condition in which a user's simple prompt is automatically expanded into a full 5W3H specification by an AI-assisted authoring interface, and a new research question on cross-model output consistency. Across 2,160 model outputs (3 languages x 4 conditions x 3 LLMs x 60 tasks), we find that AI-expanded 5W3H prompts (Condition D) show no statistically significant difference in goal alignment from manually crafted 5W3H prompts (Condition C) across all three languages, while requiring only a single-sentence input from the user. Structured PPS conditions often reduce or reshape cross-model output variance, though this effect is not uniform across languages and metrics; the strongest evidence comes from identifying spurious low variance in unconstrained baselines. We also show that unstructured prompts exhibit a systematic dual-inflation bias: artificially high composite scores and artificially low apparent cross-model variance. These findings suggest that structured 5W3H representations can improve intent alignment and accessibility across languages and models, especially when AI-assisted authoring lowers the barrier for non-expert users.
2603.25379.paper_summary_zh: 結構化意圖表示是否能在不同語言和模型中泛化？我們研究了PPS（提示協議規範），這是一個基於5W3H的框架，用於人類與AI互動中的結構化意圖表示，並在三個維度上擴展了先前僅限於中文的證據：兩種額外語言（英語和日語）、一種第四條件，其中用戶的簡單提示被AI輔助創作介面自動擴展為完整的5W3H規範，以及一個關於跨模型輸出一致性的新的研究問題。在2160個模型輸出中（3種語言 x 4種條件 x 3個LLM x 60個任務），我們發現AI擴展的5W3H提示（條件D）在所有三種語言中與手動製作的5W3H提示（條件C）在目標對齊上沒有統計上顯著的差異，同時只需要用戶提供一個單句輸入。結構化的PPS條件通常會減少或重塑跨模型輸出的變異性，儘管這種效果在不同語言和指標中並不均勻；最強的證據來自於識別無約束基線中的虛假低變異性。我們還顯示，非結構化提示表現出系統性的雙重膨脹偏差：人為地高的綜合分數和人為地低的明顯跨模型變異性。這些發現表明，結構化的5W3H表示可以改善意圖對齊和不同語言及模型的可及性，特別是在AI輔助創作降低了非專家用戶的門檻時。
2603.25379.author: Peng Gang et.al.
